\tzpentry{ID3644}{Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3644 introduces Quantum Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\mathcal{G}}_{\mu\nu}[t] = \Module\left[\begin{aligned} &\{\mathcal{K}, T_{\mu\nu}, \rho_{\text{quantum}}, S_{\text{vN}}\}, \\ &\mathcal{K}[t,t'] = \exp[-(t-t')/\tau_{\text{dec}}] \times \Theta(t-t'); \\ &\hat{\mathcal{G}}_{\mu\nu} = \int_{-\infty}^t \mathcal{K}[t,\tau] \times \left[T_{\mu\nu}(\tau) + \frac{\hbar c^3}{8\pi G}\Delta S_{\mu\nu}(\tau)\right] d\tau; \\ &\Delta S_{\mu\nu} = \partial_{\mu}\partial_{\nu}S_{\text{vN}}[\rho] - g_{\mu\nu}\Box S_{\text{vN}}[\rho] \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
